title: CM Capital Infrastructure
name: CM Capital Infrastructure
statement_of_work: Friday, May 29, 2026, from qualified firms interested in providing Construction Management services to support the Capital Infrastructure Projects team within the Facilities Planning and Development division. The RFQ package with additional information and attachments can be downloaded directly from our website at https://health.ucdavis.edu/facilities/work-with-us/consultants/rfq starting Friday, May 1st, 2026.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the CM Capital Infrastructure solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
